structure.unit: General Provisions; Protection and Promotion of Agriculture
Department and Commissioner of Agriculture and Consumer Services

law.catch_line: Commissioner may serve on board of national tobacco trust entity
law.text: The Commissioner may serve in his official capacity on the board of directors of any entity established to ensure the implementation in the Commonwealth of a national tobacco trust established to provide payments to tobacco growers and tobacco quota owners to ameliorate adverse economic consequences resulting from a national settlement of states' claims against tobacco manufacturers.
